creator: james@ja.ath.cx
text:
The port, mpeg2codec does not allow setting of CC and so, gcc295 is not
used.  Port build fails when CFLAGS has -mpentium in it unless gcc295
is used (egcs or other -mpentium using cc like pgcc).

Fix: This is uuencoded, uncompressed patchfile for ports/graphics/mpeg2codec.

How-To-Repeat: Build graphics/mpeg2codec with CC set to cc and CFLAGS set to -mpentium
